title: Astral to Join OpenAI
summary:
Astral, a company focused on enhancing Python programming productivity through tools like Ruff, uv, and ty, has announced it is joining OpenAI. Its tools have achieved hundreds of millions of downloads monthly, becoming foundational for modern Python development.

A core tenet for Astral is open source, and OpenAI has committed to continuing support for Astral's existing open-source tools, allowing them to keep building in the open with their community.

The decision to join OpenAI stems from Astral's belief that AI, particularly OpenAI's Codex, represents the new frontier for boosting programming productivity. By integrating Astral's tooling and expertise with the Codex team, they aim to push this frontier forward. Their future plans include continuing to develop their open-source tools, exploring seamless integration with Codex, and broadly contributing to the future of software development.

Astral's overarching goal remains unchanged: to make programming more productive and radically transform the experience of building software. The announcement concludes with gratitude to the Astral team, investors, and users for their support and trust.
chinese_title: 阿斯特拉尔将加入OpenAI
chinese_summary:
Astral 是一家致力于通过 Ruff、uv 和 ty 等工具提升 Python 编程生产力的公司，现已宣布加入 OpenAI。其工具每月下载量达数亿次，已成为现代 Python 开发的基础。

开源是 Astral 的核心理念之一，OpenAI 已承诺继续支持 Astral 现有的开源工具，允许他们与社区一起开放构建。

加入 OpenAI 的决定源于 Astral 的信念，即人工智能，尤其是 OpenAI 的 Codex，代表了提升编程生产力的新前沿。通过将 Astral 的工具和专业知识与 Codex 团队整合，他们旨在推动这一前沿发展。他们未来的计划包括继续开发其开源工具，探索与 Codex 的无缝集成，并广泛为软件开发的未来做出贡献。

Astral 的总体目标保持不变：使编程更高效，并彻底改变软件构建的体验。该公告最后对 Astral 团队、投资者和用户一直以来的支持和信任表示感谢。

title: Afroman found not liable in defamation case
summary:
Rapper Afroman, whose real name is Joseph Foreman, was found not liable in a defamation case brought by seven Ohio police officers. A jury ruled on Wednesday that Afroman did not defame officers or invade their privacy with a satirical music video and social media posts related to a fruitless 2022 drug raid on his home by the Adams County Sheriff’s Office.

The lawsuit stemmed from Afroman's song "Lemon Pound Cake" and its music video, which incorporated real footage from his home surveillance cameras showing the raid. Officers alleged the video defamed them, invaded their privacy, and caused emotional distress. They also cited social media posts where Foreman allegedly named officers and falsely claimed they "stole my money," were "criminals disguised as law enforcement," "white supremacists," and made specific false allegations about individual officers.

Afroman's lawyer argued the song was protected free speech, combining comedy and music, and serving as social commentary on public officials. The police attorney had sought $3.9 million in damages, accusing Foreman of knowingly spreading lies. Foreman testified that the officers were responsible for the situation, stating that if they hadn't wrongly raided his house, the lawsuit and songs would not exist. The jury's verdict cleared Afroman of all charges.
chinese_title: 阿弗罗曼在诽谤案中被判无责
chinese_summary:
说唱歌手Afroman，真名约瑟夫·福尔曼，在一起由七名俄亥俄州警官提起的诽谤案中被判不承担责任。一个陪审团周三裁定，Afroman没有通过一段讽刺音乐视频和相关的社交媒体帖子诽谤警官或侵犯他们的隐私。这些视频和帖子与亚当斯县治安官办公室2022年对他住所进行的一次徒劳的毒品突袭有关。

该诉讼源于Afroman的歌曲《柠檬磅蛋糕》及其音乐视频，视频中融入了他家中监控摄像头记录的突袭真实画面。警官们声称该视频诽谤了他们，侵犯了他们的隐私，并造成了精神痛苦。他们还引用了福尔曼据称在社交媒体上点名警官并虚假声称他们“偷了我的钱”、“伪装成执法人员的罪犯”以及“白人至上者”的帖子，并对个别警官提出了具体的虚假指控。

Afroman的律师辩称这首歌是受保护的言论自由，它结合了喜剧和音乐，并作为对公职人员的社会评论。警方律师曾寻求390万美元的赔偿，指控福尔曼故意散布谎言。福尔曼作证说，警官们应该为这种情况负责，他表示如果他们没有错误地突袭他的房子，就不会有这场诉讼和这些歌曲。陪审团的裁决免除了Afroman的所有指控。

title: Google details new 24-hour process to sideload unverified Android apps
chinese_title: Google details new 24-hour process to sideload unverified Android apps

title: Austin’s surge of new housing construction drove down rents
summary:
Austin, Texas, faced a housing crisis in the 2010s, with rents skyrocketing nearly 93% from 2010-2019 due to explosive growth and limited supply. In response, Austin launched comprehensive policy reforms starting in 2015 to stimulate housing construction, particularly rentals.

Key policy changes included extensive zoning reforms, such as creating Vertical Mixed Use (VMU) categories, targeted rezoning in growth areas, easing Accessory Dwelling Unit (ADU) regulations, and eliminating citywide minimum parking requirements. The city also prioritized affordability through density bonuses for developments including income-restricted units and approved significant municipal bonds ($250M in 2018, $350M in 2022) for affordable housing initiatives. Furthermore, Austin streamlined the development process with measures like "Site Plan Lite," revised compatibility standards, and piloted an AI tool to expedite permitting.

These efforts yielded substantial results: Austin added 120,000 new housing units from 2015 to 2024, a 30% increase. This surge in supply led to a significant drop in rents; the median rent fell from $1,546 in December 2021 to $1,296 by January 2026, falling below the national median despite population growth. Rents in older, non-luxury buildings (Class C) saw an 11% decline.

Austin's multi-faceted approach demonstrates how addressing regulatory barriers can successfully increase housing supply, improve affordability for various income levels, and reverse rent growth. The city continues to pursue reforms to sustain this momentum.
chinese_title: 奥斯汀新建房屋的激增拉低了租金。
chinese_summary:
德克萨斯州奥斯汀在2010年代面临住房危机，由于爆炸性增长和供应有限，2010年至2019年间租金飙升近93%。作为回应，奥斯汀从2015年开始启动了全面的政策改革，以刺激住房建设，特别是租赁住房的建设。

主要政策变化包括广泛的区划改革，例如创建垂直混合使用（VMU）类别、在增长区域进行有针对性的重新划分、放宽附属住宅单元（ADU）规定，以及取消全市最低停车要求。该市还通过对包含收入限制单元的开发项目提供容积率奖励来优先考虑可负担性，并批准了用于经济适用房计划的大量市政债券（2018年2.5亿美元，2022年3.5亿美元）。此外，奥斯汀通过“简化场地规划”（Site Plan Lite）等措施简化了开发流程，修订了兼容性标准，并试点使用人工智能工具以加快审批速度。

这些努力取得了显著成效：从2015年到2024年，奥斯汀新增了12万套住房，增长了30%。供应的激增导致租金大幅下降；中位数租金从2021年12月的1,546美元降至2026年1月的1,296美元，尽管人口增长，仍低于全国中位数。老旧的非豪华建筑（C级）的租金下降了11%。

奥斯汀的多方面举措证明了解决监管障碍如何能够成功增加住房供应，改善不同收入群体的负担能力，并扭转租金上涨趋势。该市将继续推行改革以保持这一势头。

title: I'm OK being left behind, thanks
summary:
The author expresses a strong preference for waiting until new technologies are mature, useful, and reliable before adopting them, actively pushing back against the pressure to "get in early." They recall an early encounter with cryptocurrencies, dismissing the "don't get left behind" and "Have Fun Staying Poor" FOMO tactics, preferring to wait for stability and utility.

This sentiment extends to current AI tools, which the author largely finds unhelpful in their present state. They see little point in investing time to learn underdeveloped versions, likening it to learning an obsolete system when better alternatives are imminent.

The article argues that being an early adopter rarely offers more than bragging rights. The author cites personal experiences like waiting for Git to become stable before learning it, and their early immersion in the Metaverse for their MSc, which proved to be "a complete waste of time." They note that for every successful early tech, there's a risk of investing in a dead-end.

Ultimately, the author dismisses the idea of being "left behind" as "nonsense," particularly given that new generations constantly start fresh. They conclude that it is "100% OK to wait and see if something is actually useful" before committing time and effort.
chinese_title: 我被落下没关系，谢谢。
chinese_summary:
作者明确表示，他强烈倾向于等到新技术成熟、有用且可靠后再采用，并积极抵制“抢先入场”的压力。作者回忆起早期接触加密货币的经历，当时他对此类“不要被时代抛弃”和“穷着玩吧”的FOMO（错失恐惧）营销策略不以为然，宁愿等待其稳定性和实用性。

这种心态也延伸到当前的AI工具，作者认为它们目前的状态大多而言并无多大帮助。他认为，投入时间去学习那些尚未成熟的版本意义不大，这就像在更好的替代方案即将问世时，去学习一个即将被淘汰的系统。

文章指出，成为早期采用者所能带来的，往往不过是些炫耀的资本。作者援引个人经历，例如他等到Git稳定后才开始学习，以及他在攻读硕士学位期间早期投身元宇宙研究，结果却发现那“完全是浪费时间”。他指出，每一种成功的早期技术，都伴随着投资到死胡同的风险。

最终，作者将“被落下”的想法斥为“无稽之谈”，尤其考虑到新一代人总是不断地从零开始。他总结道，在投入时间和精力之前，“百分之百可以先观望，看看某个事物是否真正有用”。

title: ArXiv declares independence from Cornell
summary:
ArXiv, the pioneering preprint server, is transitioning from being a center within Cornell University Library to an independent legal entity named ArXiv Inc., effective January 2024. This strategic move is designed to secure ArXiv's long-term sustainability, stability, and growth capabilities, allowing it to evolve as a critical open science platform.

While ArXiv Inc. will remain a wholly owned subsidiary of Cornell University, maintaining its institutional link, it will gain operational autonomy. This independence is crucial for diversifying its funding beyond its current model of member institutions and grants, enabling it to pursue philanthropic giving and larger grants to support future initiatives.

The shift will facilitate ArXiv's plans to expand its user base and content into new scientific fields, modernize its technology and infrastructure, and develop enhanced services such as improved moderation, links to peer review, and integration of AI tools. Founded in 1991 and hosted by Cornell since 2001, ArXiv currently houses over 2.5 million preprints. The new governance structure, including its own board of directors, aims to provide the flexibility needed for ArXiv to navigate its future effectively.
chinese_title: ArXiv 宣布从康奈尔独立
chinese_summary:
ArXiv，这一开创性的预印本服务器，将于2024年1月起从康奈尔大学图书馆的一个中心转变为一个名为ArXiv Inc.的独立法律实体。此项战略举措旨在确保ArXiv的长期可持续性、稳定性和增长能力，使其能够发展成为一个重要的开放科学平台。

尽管ArXiv Inc.仍将是康奈尔大学的全资子公司，保持其机构联系，但它将获得运营自主权。这种独立性对于实现资金来源多元化至关重要，使其能够超越目前由成员机构和赠款组成的模式，转而寻求慈善捐赠和更大规模的赠款，以支持未来的各项举措。

这一转变将促进ArXiv的计划，包括将其用户群和内容扩展到新的科学领域，现代化其技术和基础设施，并开发增强型服务，例如改进的内容审核、与同行评审的链接以及人工智能工具的整合。ArXiv成立于1991年，自2001年起由康奈尔大学托管，目前拥有超过250万份预印本。新的治理结构，包括其独立的董事会，旨在提供所需的灵活性，以便ArXiv有效应对未来发展。

title: A sufficiently detailed spec is code
summary:
The author criticizes "agentic coding" advocates who claim to generate code from specifications, arguing their claims are misleading and rooted in two misconceptions. The first is that specification documents are simpler than code; the second, that spec work is inherently more thoughtful.

Using OpenAI's Symphony project, the author demonstrates that its "SPEC.md" is not a specification but "thinly-veiled code," containing database schemas, logic, and explicit functions. This illustrates that for a specification to be precise enough for reliable code generation, it must essentially become code, as argued by Dijkstra regarding "narrow interfaces."

The author personally tested this, attempting to generate Symphony in Haskell using Claude Code, which produced buggy and non-functional results despite fixes. This "flakiness" highlights that even detailed specifications don't guarantee working code, and further expanding them for precision would become unmanageably large, akin to Borges' map.

Regarding the second misconception, the author contends that industry pressure for delivery speed often compromises thoughtfulness, leading to "slop" in specifications—like Symphony's `SPEC.md`, which reads as incoherent and AI-generated.

In conclusion, the author states that specifications are not time-saving devices. If speed is the priority, writing code directly is more effective. Coding agents cannot infer clarity or detail from vague inputs; "garbage in, garbage out" applies, and confused thoughts cannot be compensated for by an agent.
chinese_title: 足够详细的规范就是代码
chinese_summary:
作者批评了那些声称能从规格说明书生成代码的“智能体编程”倡导者，认为他们的主张具有误导性，并源于两个误解。第一个误解是规格说明书比代码更简单；第二个误解是规格说明书工作本质上更需深思熟虑。

作者以OpenAI的Symphony项目为例，指出其“SPEC.md”并非规格说明书，而是“披着薄薄一层伪装的代码”，其中包含数据库模式、逻辑和显式函数。这表明，要使规格说明书足够精确以可靠地生成代码，它本质上必须成为代码，正如迪杰斯特拉（Dijkstra）就“窄接口”所论证的那样。

作者亲自测试了这一点，尝试使用Claude Code以Haskell语言生成Symphony，结果尽管经过修复，仍然产生了有bug且无法正常运行的结果。这种“不稳定性”凸显出，即使是详细的规格说明书也无法保证生成可用的代码，而为了精确性进一步扩展它们则会变得庞大到难以管理，类似于博尔赫斯的地图。

关于第二个误解，作者认为行业对交付速度的压力常常会损害深思熟虑性，从而导致规格说明书中的“草率”——例如Symphony的`SPEC.md`读起来语无伦次，像是AI生成的。

总之，作者指出规格说明书并非省时工具。如果速度是优先事项，直接编写代码更有效。编程智能体无法从模糊的输入中推断出清晰度或细节；“垃圾进，垃圾出”的原则适用，混乱的思维无法通过智能体得到弥补。

title: Chuck Norris has died
summary:
Chuck Norris, the legendary action icon, martial arts champion, and star of "Walker, Texas Ranger," has died at 86 on March 20, 2026. He passed away peacefully in Hawaii, surrounded by his family, who remembered him as a devoted husband, loving father, and inspirational figure.

Norris was a genuine martial arts master, holding multiple black belts in various disciplines and creating his own hybrid style, Chun Kuk Do. His prolific film career included memorable roles alongside Bruce Lee in "The Way of the Dragon" (1972) and starring in action hits such as "The Delta Force," "Missing in Action" (dedicated to his late brother), and "Code of Silence." He later joined an ensemble of action stars in "The Expendables 2" (2012).

His television career saw him achieve further fame leading the CBS series "Walker, Texas Ranger" from 1993 to 2001. In later years, Norris became a pop culture phenomenon through internet memes celebrating his fictional feats, appeared in infomercials, and was known for his conservative political views.

Born Carlos Ray Norris in Ryan, Oklahoma, he began his martial arts training during his Air Force service in South Korea. After leaving the military, he established a chain of karate schools that attracted celebrity clients. He is survived by his second wife, Gena O’Kelley, five children, and numerous grandchildren.

title: “Your frustration is the product”
chinese_title: 你的沮丧是产品

title: Show HN: Three new Kitten TTS models – smallest less than 25MB
summary:
Kitten TTS v0.8 introduces three new open-source, lightweight text-to-speech (TTS) models built on ONNX, ranging from 15M to 80M parameters. The smallest, `kitten-tts-nano` (int8), occupies less than 25MB, while the largest, `kitten-tts-mini`, is 80MB.

Designed for CPU-only inference, Kitten TTS delivers high-quality 24 kHz audio efficiently without requiring a GPU, making it ideal for edge deployment. Key features include 8 built-in voices (Bella, Jasper, Luna, etc.), adjustable speech speed, and robust text preprocessing for numbers, currencies, and units.

Currently in developer preview, the library supports Python 3.8+ and offers a straightforward `pip install` process and simple API for generating audio or saving to files. An online demo is available on Hugging Face Spaces.

Commercial support is offered for integration, custom voice development, and enterprise licensing. The project is licensed under Apache License 2.0, with community support available via Discord and GitHub. Future plans include optimized inference, mobile SDKs, higher quality and multilingual models, and an ASR (Automatic Speech Recognition) component.

title: Noq: n0's new QUIC implementation in Rust
summary:
n0 has announced noq (”number 0 QUIC”), a new general-purpose QUIC implementation in Rust with multipath and NAT traversal support, which has powered iroh since v0.96.

noq originated as a hard fork of Quinn, necessitated by iroh's extensive needs for managing multiple paths, NAT traversal, and congestion outside of Quinn's visibility. As iroh pursued deeper structural changes for QUIC multipath and its unique relay-as-a-path architecture, the development trajectories of the two projects diverged significantly. The hard fork allows n0 to implement these fundamental changes without burdening Quinn maintainers, while maintaining a commitment to collaboration where interests align.

Key features of noq include a full, generic implementation of the QUIC Multipath spec, making various network paths (relay, direct IPv4/IPv6) first-class QUIC concepts. This enables intelligent path selection and per-path congestion management, systematically improving latency. It also provides a robust, production-grade implementation of the QUIC NAT traversal draft, battle-tested on iroh devices, which cleans up and enhances reliability by making NAT operations QUIC-aware. noq further integrates QUIC Address Discovery (QAD) to learn public IP addresses, replacing STUN with an encrypted, privacy-enhancing solution. Enhanced QLog support aids debugging, even visualizing multipath packet flows. A new WeakConnectionHandle API facilitates building connection managers.

Already in production with iroh v0.96, noq has also passed interoperability tests with picoquic. n0 plans to evolve noq as a long-term foundation, focusing on further NAT traversal and performance optimizations, and maintaining engagement with the QUIC working group and Quinn team. They invite collaborators working on QUIC, p2p transport, or applications needing robust network performance.
chinese_title: Noq: n0's new QUIC implementation in Rust
chinese_summary:
n0 has announced noq (”number 0 QUIC”), a new general-purpose QUIC implementation in Rust with multipath and NAT traversal support, which has powered iroh since v0.96.

noq originated as a hard fork of Quinn, necessitated by iroh's extensive needs for managing multiple paths, NAT traversal, and congestion outside of Quinn's visibility. As iroh pursued deeper structural changes for QUIC multipath and its unique relay-as-a-path architecture, the development trajectories of the two projects diverged significantly. The hard fork allows n0 to implement these fundamental changes without burdening Quinn maintainers, while maintaining a commitment to collaboration where interests align.

Key features of noq include a full, generic implementation of the QUIC Multipath spec, making various network paths (relay, direct IPv4/IPv6) first-class QUIC concepts. This enables intelligent path selection and per-path congestion management, systematically improving latency. It also provides a robust, production-grade implementation of the QUIC NAT traversal draft, battle-tested on iroh devices, which cleans up and enhances reliability by making NAT operations QUIC-aware. noq further integrates QUIC Address Discovery (QAD) to learn public IP addresses, replacing STUN with an encrypted, privacy-enhancing solution. Enhanced QLog support aids debugging, even visualizing multipath packet flows. A new WeakConnectionHandle API facilitates building connection managers.

Already in production with iroh v0.96, noq has also passed interoperability tests with picoquic. n0 plans to evolve noq as a long-term foundation, focusing on further NAT traversal and performance optimizations, and maintaining engagement with the QUIC working group and Quinn team. They invite collaborators working on QUIC, p2p transport, or applications needing robust network performance.
